description: Maps workflow roles to preferred models and harnesses. Override with HARNESS=... or by choosing a different terminal.

macro-reviewer.notes: Big picture: design quality for docs (gemini), spec fidelity for code (gpt-5.4). GPT excluded from design processes.

micro-reviewer.notes: Line-level code quality. Open models (glm-5, minimax, kimi-k2.5, grok, mimo) dropped 2026-03-31 — review grades showed 0-67% pass rates with false negatives and HARMFUL grades. GPT-5.4 via opencode is the only reliable non-Claude reviewer.

guidance.description: Per-model guidance files that supplement role instructions. Injected when a model is used for a role where we've observed specific failure modes. Not rubrics — context about what matters and why.
